remarks: Experience contemporary loft living in this beautifully updated 1-bedroom corner residence at SoNo Lofts. Bathed in natural light from oversized windows and enhanced by soaring 10-foot ceilings, this inviting home offers an airy open layout designed for both everyday comfort and entertaining. The modern kitchen showcases granite countertops, a spacious center island, stainless steel appliances, and designer lighting, while warm wood accents add a sophisticated touch. The bedroom offers generous closet space and stylish finishes, and the spa-inspired bath features floor-to-ceiling tile, concrete flooring, a sleek vanity, and an upgraded showerhead. Freshly painted and meticulously cleaned, the home also includes electric shades, a walk-in coat closet, pantry, in-unit washer/dryer combo, and abundant storage throughout. Residents enjoy a fitness center and dedicated storage in the lower level, and an assigned parking space in the garage. Located in the heart of vibrant SoNo, you'll be moments from waterfront dining, shopping, entertainment, Metro-North, and major highways for an exceptional blend of convenience and lifestyle.
